SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELCH, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EPISCOPAL COMMUNITY SERVICES: NEXT DOOR $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT CONTEST LIABILITY AND SUBMITTED $1,500.00 AS THE VALUE OF THE POSSESSIONS TAKEN. THE COURT FINDS THIS FIGURE TO BE FAIR AND REASONABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
